It then searches for GitHub source code link patterns, correcting line number references and URL parts, such as replacing commit hashes with version tags. The code uses regex to parse and update link syntax, ensuring links are consistent and correct. There are no dynamic code executions, external network connections, or obfuscated patterns. The code operates solely on local filesystem data, with no signs of malicious behavior or hidden backdoors.",
